title: Fandoms
description: Per-project user-extensible fandom knowledge. Lives at projects/<slug>/fandoms.json and is loaded into expert chat context so fandom-researcher and others have access to your custom scenes, visual language notes, and song suggestions alongside their built-in prose knowledge.

aliases.description: Alternate names or abbreviations users might type.

visual_language.description: Short note on the color grade, framing, and palette of this property. Guides color-grader.

canonical_songs.description: Songs strongly associated with this fandom (trailers, opening themes, iconic needle drops).

scene.description: Short human-readable description of the moment.

timestamp.description: Timestamp in H:MM:SS or MM:SS form.

emotion.description: Primary emotion the scene carries (grief, triumph, fear, etc.).

sync_targets.description: Moments in the scene that match common beat-map events.
